chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 53 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 20.10.2025 Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2019 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On 16.09.2019 matter was adjourned at the request of applicant’s counsel. On 27.10.2020 time was once again sought to reformulate questions of law. Today, counsel for the applicant is present but no reformulated questions of law have been presented and merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
